task_03.code:
import re
def parse_phone(text):
    matches = re.findall(r'\((\d{3})\)\s(\d{3})-(\d{4})', text)
    return [''.join(m) for m in matches]

task_05.code:
def merge_sorted(a, b):
    i = j = 0
    res = []
    while i < len(a) and j < len(b):
        if a[i] < b[j]: res.append(a[i]); i += 1
        else: res.append(b[j]); j += 1
    res.extend(a[i:]); res.extend(b[j:])
    return res

task_22.code:
import time
class TaskTimer:
    def __enter__(self): self.start = time.time(); return self
    def __exit__(self, *a): self.duration = time.time() - self.start

task_25.code:
def make_counter(s):
    curr = [s]
    def inc(): curr[0] += 1; return curr[0]
    return inc

task_26.code:
class SumList(list):
    def get_sum(self): return sum(x for x in self if isinstance(x, (int, float)))

task_34.code:
class QueryBuilder:
    def __init__(self): self.q = ''
    def select(self, c): self.q += f'SELECT {c}'; return self
    def from_table(self, t): self.q += f' FROM {t}'; return self
    def build(self): return self.q

task_37.code:
def compare_versions(v1, v2):
    p1 = [int(x) for x in v1.split('.')]
    p2 = [int(x) for x in v2.split('.')]
    if p1 < p2: return -1
    if p1 > p2: return 1
    return 0

task_41.code:
class CircularBuffer:
    def __init__(self, c): self.c = c; self.b = []
    def push(self, v): self.b.append(v); self.b = self.b[-self.c:]
    def get_all(self): return self.b

task_42.code:
class AppError(Exception): pass
class NetworkError(AppError): pass
class DatabaseError(AppError): pass
def handle_error(e):
    if isinstance(e, DatabaseError): return 504
    if isinstance(e, NetworkError): return 503
    if isinstance(e, AppError): return 500
    return 0

task_45.code:
class AsyncResource:
    async def connect(self): pass
    async def close(self): pass
    async def __aenter__(self): await self.connect(); return self
    async def __aexit__(self, *a): await self.close()

task_46.code:
def get_public_methods(o):
    return [m for m in dir(o.__class__) if not m.startswith('_') and callable(getattr(o, m))]

task_51.code:
def binary_search(arr, x):
    l, r = 0, len(arr)-1
    while l <= r:
        m = (l+r)//2
        if arr[m] < x: l = m + 1
        elif arr[m] > x: r = m - 1
        else: return m
    return -1

task_55.code:
def factorial(n):
    res = 1
    for i in range(2, n+1): res *= i
    return res

task_59.code: def are_anagrams(s1, s2): return sorted(s1.replace(' ','').lower()) == sorted(s2.replace(' ','').lower())
